masterPrompt: Mythic Natural Realism, cinematic square environmental artwork with tactile stone, weather, water, roots, and living light. Create one master composition for node body.health.general-wellbeing; all five capacity states will be deterministic treatments of this exact Recraft scene, so do not encode a capacity state or warning tint in the composition itself. Prompt intent: Show whole-person wellbeing as several life-giving waters finding a stable shared level, with room for variation rather than perfection. Universal human-capacity force: spring-fed basin where many tributaries settle into a steady common level. This identity is universal and independent of any aim, goal, profession, or sport. Fractal family: self-similar living mountain watershed; root ridges resolving into vascular river deltas; interlocking leaf, stone, and water membranes; nested catchments joining a calm, resilient lake surface. Parent geometry must visibly become child geography rather than a separate icon or panel. Inherited parent visual DNA: edge: living convergence of breath, tide, stone, canopy, weather, and relationship; self-similar living mountain watershed; anchor a luminous watershed spiral held at the living mountain heart | body: tectonic vitality; self-similar living mountain watershed; root ridges resolving into vascular river deltas; anchor a forked river vein crossing a basalt ridge | body.health: whole-body equilibrium; self-similar living mountain watershed; root ridges resolving into vascular river deltas; interlocking leaf, stone, and water membranes; anchor a translucent membrane encircling a warm mineral core. Transition anchor: preserve and clarify the warm mineral core opening into a many-fed circular basin. Neutral master palette: basalt black, lichen green, sunlit ochre, glacial white, warm natural gold, balanced full tonal range suitable for later cool, clear, amber, and controlled-crimson grading. Accessibility purpose: Describe the body.health.general-wellbeing environment as a non-diagnostic natural process whose identity and capacity state remain understandable without relying on colour. Pipeline intent 2.0.0: Generate one universal, text-free Mythic Natural Realism composition whose inherited landmark remains spatially stable across all deterministic capacity-state treatments. Single immersive natural world, inspectable detail, coherent central landmark, no decorative bokeh, no gradient blobs. No embedded text, numbers, or logos. No interface, cards, frames, badges, charts, people, faces, medical symbols, diagnoses, or aim-specific objects.
